title: Providing amounts for the expenses of the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology in the One Hundred Nineteenth Congress.
plain_summary: This bill gives money to a group of lawmakers called the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology so they can do their work. The committee will get about 18.6 million dollars to pay for things they need during the 119th Congress, which lasts for two years. The money is divided between the two years with rules about how much they can spend each year. The committee has to follow certain rules when they ask for the money and when they spend it.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on House Administration.
subjects: House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology

sections.title: Section 1 Amounts for Committee Expenses
sections.text: The Committee on Science, Space, and Technology will be given money to pay for its expenses during the One Hundred Nineteenth Congress. This includes paying all staff salaries and other costs. The House of Representatives will pay no more than eighteen million six hundred seventeen thousand eighty-five dollars from its committee salary and expense accounts.

sections.title: Section 2 Session Limitations
sections.text: The money mentioned in Section 1 will be divided into two parts. During the first year from noon on January third two thousand twenty-five until right before noon on January third two thousand twenty-six, the committee can spend no more than nine million two hundred twenty-eight thousand five hundred ninety-nine dollars. During the second year from noon on January third two thousand twenty-six until right before noon on January third two thousand twenty-seven, the committee can spend no more than nine million three hundred eighty-eight thousand four hundred eighty-six dollars.

sections.title: Section 3 Vouchers
sections.text: To get money under this resolution, the committee must use vouchers (official payment requests). The committee must approve these vouchers, and the Chairman of the Committee must sign them. The Committee on House Administration must also approve them in the way they require.

sections.title: Section 4 Regulations
sections.text: The committee must spend the money according to rules set by the Committee on House Administration.
